name: Mimikatz DC Sync
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Benjamin Delpy, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Scott Dermott, Sorina Ionescu
SIGMA Title: Mimikatz DC Sync
SIGMA Description: Detects Mimikatz DC sync security events

False positives:
- Valid DC Sync that is not covered by the filters; please report
- Local Domain Admin account used for Azure AD Connect

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4662 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%replicating directory changes all%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1131f6ad-9c07-11d1-f79f-00c04fc2dcd2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1131f6aa-9c07-11d1-f79f-00c04fc2dcd2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%9923a32a-3607-11d2-b9be-0000f87a36b2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%89e95b76-444d-4c62-991a-0facbeda640c%') AND "Access Mask"='0x100') AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%window manager%' OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%nt aut%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msol_%') OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%$%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Mimikatz DC Sync on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4662 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%replicating directory changes all%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1131f6ad-9c07-11d1-f79f-00c04fc2dcd2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1131f6aa-9c07-11d1-f79f-00c04fc2dcd2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%9923a32a-3607-11d2-b9be-0000f87a36b2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%89e95b76-444d-4c62-991a-0facbeda640c%') AND "Access Mask"='0x100') AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%window manager%' OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%nt aut%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msol_%') OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%$%'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
